name: linkit
description: Linkit Chrome extension — LinkedIn auto-connect + bulk skill deletion (MV3).

scripts.release:prep: npm run format && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: prepare release'
scripts.release: npm run release:prep && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm version patch -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:prep && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm version minor -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run release:prep && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm version major -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push --follow-tags
